---
title: "Ai4MatLectures"
subtitle: "PyTorch teaching notebooks for materials science"
---

Teaching notebooks for the ECLIPSE Lab lecture triad at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg.
Install the package:

```bash
pip install git+https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab/Ai4MatLectures.git "mdsdata>=0.1.5"
```

## MFML — Mathematical Foundations of AI & ML

| Week | Topic | Dataset | Notebook |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4 | NN architecture & backprop | Iris / Alpaydin Digits | [week04_classifier_iris](notebooks/MFML/week04_classifier_iris.html), [week05_backprop_digits](notebooks/MFML/week05_backprop_digits.html) |
| 5 | Clustering & autoencoders | Nanoindentation / Ising full | [week11_clustering_nanoindentation](notebooks/MFML/week11_clustering_nanoindentation.html), [week10_autoencoder_ising_full](notebooks/MFML/week10_autoencoder_ising_full.html) |
| 7 | Overfitting & regularization | Ising light | [week07_overfitting_ising_light](notebooks/MFML/week07_overfitting_ising_light.html) |
| 10 | Latent spaces & embeddings | Ising full | [week10_autoencoder_ising_full](notebooks/MFML/week10_autoencoder_ising_full.html) |
| 11 | Unsupervised learning (deep dive) | Nanoindentation | [week11_clustering_nanoindentation](notebooks/MFML/week11_clustering_nanoindentation.html) |

## MLPC — ML in Materials Processing & Characterization

| Week | Topic | Dataset | Notebook |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4 | Microstructure representations & CNN baseline | Alpaydin Digits / Ising | [week04_baseline_digits](notebooks/MLPC/week04_baseline_digits.html), [week05_cnn_ising_light](notebooks/MLPC/week05_cnn_ising_light.html), [week05_cnn_ising_full](notebooks/MLPC/week05_cnn_ising_full.html) |
| 5 | Unsupervised learning in materials | Cahn-Hilliard | [week11_anomaly_cahn_hilliard](notebooks/MLPC/week11_anomaly_cahn_hilliard.html) |
| 7 | Process monitoring | Tensile Test | [week07_process_monitoring_tensile](notebooks/MLPC/week07_process_monitoring_tensile.html) |
| 11 | Anomaly detection via AE (automation context) | Cahn-Hilliard | [week11_anomaly_cahn_hilliard](notebooks/MLPC/week11_anomaly_cahn_hilliard.html) |

## MG — Materials Genomics

| Week | Topic | Dataset | Notebook |
|---|---|---|---|
| 5 | Descriptors + regression | Chemical Elements | [week05_descriptors_elements](notebooks/MG/week05_descriptors_elements.html) |
| 8 | Regression & generalization | Nanoindentation | [week08_regression_nanoindentation](notebooks/MG/week08_regression_nanoindentation.html) |
| 11 | Latent space (Ising) | Ising light | [week11_latent_ising](notebooks/MG/week11_latent_ising.html) |
| 11 | Materials latent space | Cahn-Hilliard | [week11_latent_cahn_hilliard](notebooks/MG/week11_latent_cahn_hilliard.html) |
